sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86692" key="proapote/lesma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προαπο-τέλεσμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n86692.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">previous influence of a star,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:114" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">114</biblScope> </bibl>:—hence <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προαπο-τελεσματικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">concerned therewith,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:109" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">109</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
